description: Composition Purple, black, white and pink check shorts, with a buttoned and zippered waist, loops on waist, pocket on the right, mock pocket flaps at the back and foldover hemsFittingComfortWash careHand wash or machine washComfort in small size, this pair of shorts is a great summer wear. Colourful and stylish, the cotton fabric keeps your dry and fresh throughout as you enjoy a warm, summery day in it. The zippered and buttoned front allows the broad waist band to stay snug, while the loops allow you to wear a stylish belt either for Fit or fashion. Great to wear to the beach and gym, team this with classy art canvas shoes for that stylish look. On cooler days, simply wear it over tights and rule the day.
